summary.key_theme: Quanta Services 受惠於 AI 資料中心基礎設施需求，長期成長動能強勁，儘管短期股價隨市場波動出現修正。

bullish.title: Quanta Services: Buy The Bottleneck Between AI And Energized Power
bullish.reason: 分析師指出 Quanta Services 正轉型為電力容量經紀商，在 AI 基礎設施需求激增的背景下，具備強大的 2026 年成長前景與稀缺性溢價。

bullish.title: Jensen Huang's Blue-Collar Millionaire Prediction Lifted Quanta Services' Backlog to $48 Billion
bullish.reason: 受惠於 AI 基礎設施需求，公司積壓訂單（Backlog）達到 480 億美元的歷史高位，顯示長期營收能見度極高。

bullish.title: Quanta Services (NYSE:PWR): A High-Quality Infrastructure Stock with Superior Growth and Cash Flow
bullish.reason: 強調公司具備 21.56% 的獲利成長率與強勁現金流，屬於高品質基礎設施投資標的。

bullish.title: Quanta Services (PWR) Is Chasing AI Data Centers To Build Its Next Growth Engine
bullish.reason: 公司積極布局 AI 資料中心電力基礎設施，將其視為下一個核心成長引擎，市場對其策略轉型持正面態度。

bearish.title: Quanta Services (PWR) Suffers a Larger Drop Than the General Market: Key Insights
bearish.reason: 股價單日下跌 2.75%，表現弱於大盤，反映短期獲利了結賣壓或市場對高估值的修正。

bearish.title: Quanta Services (PWR) Stock Slides as Market Rises: Facts to Know Before You Trade
bearish.reason: 在市場整體上漲時股價卻出現下跌，顯示短期技術面偏弱，投資人需留意股價波動風險。

neutral.title: Jim Cramer Says Microchip Is Near A Bottom — 'I Don't See It Yet' — While Nebius Is 'Not Done Going Down'
neutral.reason: Jim Cramer 提及多檔股票，雖包含 PWR，但未給出具體買賣建議或針對性分析，對股價影響有限。

neutral.title: Here’s How Much You Would Have Made Owning Quanta Services Stock In The Last 10 Years
neutral.reason: 回顧過去 10 年績效，顯示公司年化報酬率優於大盤 24.6%，屬於歷史數據回顧，對未來股價走勢無直接影響。
